title: Epic Fight - Invincible Lib
description: A lib that help you create key combination combos and skill easier
body:
# Invincible 无坚不摧

## What's Epic Fight - Invincible?

This mod has nothing to do with the [invincible TV series](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Invincible_\(TV_series\)). It gets its name from the opposite of "indestructible".

This is a support library designed to facilitate the registration of epic combat combo data for code developers and data pack creators. It allows for the convenient construction of new weapon templates and supports many specific features, similar to [Indestructible](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-indestructible) but invincible is for player.

## What can I do with Invincible Lib?

With invincible lib, you can:

1.  Create a simple custom weapon innate skill from a json file with custom animation, custom icon, costom stack size and executing commands.
2.  Create complex combos with different key combinations and conditions.
3.  Create entity after image and ground slam by command.
4.  **Continuously updating**...

## How to start?

note that different epicfight version

[Full wiki](https://github.com/GaylordFockerCN/EpicFight-Invincible/wiki)

[Custom code combo demo (java)](https://github.com/GaylordFockerCN/EpicFight-Invincible/blob/1.20.1-20.11/src/main/java/com/p1nero/invincible/gameassets/InvincibleDemoSkills.java)

[Simple custom weapon innate skill demo (json)](https://github.com/GaylordFockerCN/EpicFight-Invincible/blob/1.20.1-20.11/run/config/invincible_skills/demo.json)

[Custom json combo file (json)](https://github.com/GaylordFockerCN/EpicFight-Invincible/blob/1.20.1-20.11/run/config/invincible_combos/demo.json)
